channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: A double or king size mattress, 10th March
item.description:
Dear Council Team, I would like to report a large dirty mattress that someone has dumped directly in front of my gate. It is very large, unsightly, and is causing an obstruction to access. The mattress has been left there since last Sunday and has not been removed. It appears to have been fly-tipped and is becoming a nuisance. I would appreciate it if the council could arrange for it to be removed as soon as possible. Location: SE208JB Please let me know if any further information is needed. Kind regards,,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 140, Maple Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Syringe, 10th March
item.description:
I saw a syringe inside a packet yesterday st this location. Please remove, it's dangerous for children.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Passage, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 10th March
item.description:
The collection of litter and rubbish in the shrubs along this stretch has got worse again. All needs picking up, then shrubs cut back to keep sight lines clear at junction with Roberton drive.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plaistow Lane, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dear Denise Hackney Council housing manager. could you please address this anti-social behaviour & fly tipping behaviour from a resident who lives at 20 Daintry way E9 5JJ who has fly tipped a large skip size of garden waste, household items outside daintry way block on 06/03/26 & outside another residence property at 12 Daintry way on 09/03/26. The resident at 20 Daintry way has cut down another resident bush at number 17 Daintry way E9 5JJ without any authorization or permission, consent from resident causing a large mess in the Daintry way communal garden outside the back of his property.This poor resident has motability issues and he could not clean the mess up. resident at 20 Daintry way then took the mess & dumped it outside another resident bungalow.The resident of 20 Daintry way has fly tipped a skip size garden waste outside the back of my property at 12 Daintry way E95JJ. I would like to know who's going to pay for the cleanup cost of fly tipped items. Housing officer Denise corbin needs to address this behavior and stop allowing residents fly tipping. Causing upset to many residents. Denise Corbin is ignoring residence concerns, fire risk that residence raised not doing her duty. There is clear signage in the area warming residents of prosecution if court fly tipping to be but this is ignored so why put the signs up. Garden foreman for Hackney Council taking cigarettes bribes from resident to do clean up jobs & private work. Hackney Council gardening team foreman did not know what to do with the large skip of garden waste dumped taking photos on his phone but did not do anything on site visit. The site foreman garden team taking cigarette bribes from the resident for many years possibly polish cigarettes., 10th March
item.description:
Fly tipping. Hackney Council corruption. Housing officer who does not do her duty.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hillman Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 10th March
item.description:
The street light outside no. 1 St Mary's Avenue, BR2 is not working at night. Located near bus stop and Church Hall it is needed because of uneven pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Mary's Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping - Glenmore Road, 10th March
item.description:
Between 44-46 Glenmore Road, Welling - plywood, etc
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glenmore Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping r/o Samry Bottlestop Ltd - 20 Pickford Lane, 10th March
item.description:
Flytipping r/o Samry Bottlestop Ltd - 20 Pickford Lane - mattrresses and sofa's have been dumped at the rear of the shop
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole outside 102 Tyrrell Avenue, 10th March
item.description:
Pothole has been there for months and is a danger to public crossing the road because if you fell because of it you could break your ankle. It was repaired previously but obviously not well enough
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tyrrell Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 10th March
item.description:
Flytip in gateway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sabines Road, Navestock, Brentwood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree roots lifting pavement, 10th March
item.description:
Tree roots lifting pavement outside property, causing trip hazard JW
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Forde Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I’ve reported this light - number 36 - as not working many times over last 4 months. It has been repaired twice - most recently a few days ago - but worked for just a day or so but was again out last night at 7.25 pm, 10th March
item.description:
Would it be possible to get this light on properly please as I am fed up reporting it. Thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albemarle Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large dogs off leash, 10th March
item.description:
There are large dogs off leash on De Beauvoir Square on a daily basis. Owners are hostile when called out on dogs not being allowed. There are currently two large dogs running around whilst the council employees are mowing. HC employees are letting them!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Albany Street from number 1-33 and further north, 10th March
item.description:
The roadworks which will continue for another 3 weeks have caused very bad traffic problems in albany Street. The traffic which includes heavy lorries should have been diverted to avoid going north up Albany street and south again. The noise for residents is intolerable as well as the pollution from the traffic This is a residential area..............
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55, Albany Street, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge dumped on Kelly Avenue, 10th March
item.description:
Fridge dumped outside 50 Kelly Avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Kelly Avenue, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Web of pot holes, 10th March
item.description:
The pot holes on Leigham Court Road are very dangerous. If you have a big car perhaps it doesn't matter but it has become increasingly impossible to drive on this road. They have been there for three months now and Lambeth ahs not done anything at all to repair them. WHY?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 132, Leigham Court Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light not working, 10th March
item.description:
No number on the light post but at junction Westgate and Albemarle - on the one way side of Westgate Road where it meets Albemarle.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albemarle Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More pot holes, 10th March
item.description:
Pot holes are riddling Leigham Court Road especially on the north side of the road. It is dangerous to drive up this road on north side at night you cannot see them and need to go very slowly and they are difficult to avoid. This road is dangerous and now taking a huge detour to avoid it. DO SOMETHING LAMBETH.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mount Nod Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven paving slabs, 10th March
item.description:
The uneven paving slabs have resulted im my 73yr mum having a very bad full and very bruised and shaken on the Saturday 7th march 2026 , at stone court on erith high Street im and very concerned this could happy again , she scared to go out now, I have photos on her injuries as well ,
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith High Street, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Too many potholes to count, 10th March
item.description:
There are so many potholes across the entire junction that it make it very hard to cycle across even at slow speeds you could easily bumped off your bike - this had a temporary fix last year but all signs of that have gone away and it is now even worse - this needs a complete resurface for the safety of all cyclists.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Rye, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple deep pot holes, 10th March
item.description:
Leigham Court Road is covered in pot holes for its entire length. They are deep and every few meters there is another one or a collection of ones. The road is riddled with them they have been there for months and Lambeth has done nothing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leigham Court Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
